articles.title: OpenSSL Patches High-Severity Vulnerability Found With AI

articles.title: XBOW tests Anthropic's Mythos Preview for offensive security
articles.summary: Anthropic's Mythos Preview was highly effective at finding vulnerability candidates, especially when analyzing source code. XBOW explores how the model performed across exploit discovery, reverse engineering, and live-site validation. [...]

articles.title: Hackers pose as women seeking romance to spy on Russian soldiers
articles.summary: The group, dubbed SiribClone by Russian cybersecurity firm F6, has been active since at least the summer of 2025 and has primarily targeted members of the Russian armed forces stationed in border regions and combat zones.
